caption: A man with glasses and a large, grey, towering wig is recording a podcast in an office setting. He is wearing a white button-down shirt with suspenders and a red bow tie, and he has black headphones over his wig. He sits before a black professional microphone. Behind him is a wall featuring a portrait of a man and a logo that reads "UNIQUE FASHIONS". A small framed yellow shield icon hangs on the wall. Overlaid on the screen are logos for the "BOSS TALK PODCAST" and text that reads "BOSS TALK 101". Across the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, speaking and gesturing with his right hand, which moves from his side toward the table. His facial expression remains relatively consistent as he talks into the microphone.
